sentences.arabic: اِسْتَخْدَمْتُ الْخَرِيطَةَ لِأَجِدَ مَحَطَّةَ الْقِطَارِ الرَّئِيسِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Koristio sam mapu da pronađem glavnu željezničku stanicu.
sentences.translationEn: I used the map to find the main train station.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مِنَ السَّهْلِ التَّنَقُّلُ بِوَاسِطَةِ الْحَافِلَةِ فِي هَذِهِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bilo je lako kretati se autobusom u ovom gradu.
sentences.translationEn: It was easy to get around by bus in this city.

sentences.arabic: اِشْتَرَيْتُ تَذْكِرَةً لِمُدَّةِ يَوْمٍ كَامِلٍ مِنَ الْمَكْتَبِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam kartu za cijeli dan na šalteru.
sentences.translationEn: I bought a ticket for a full day from the office.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ رَجُلاً عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ إِلَى الْمَتْحَفِ الْوَطَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam jednog čovjeka za put do nacionalnog muzeja.
sentences.translationEn: I asked a man for directions to the national museum.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ لِي الطَّرِيقَ بِوُضُوحٍ وَشَكَرْتُهُ كَثِيراً عَلَى مُسَاعَدَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Jasno mi je objasnio put i mnogo sam mu se zahvalio na pomoći.
sentences.translationEn: He explained the way to me clearly and I thanked him very much for his help.
